programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: When Yanna quits the restaurant after confessing her role in its sabotage, the gang hires an unexpected new helper — a robot vacuum — and Salim's relationship with Nina is exposed to the public.

programme.title: The Bridge Malaysia/ Singapore S2
programme.desc: A body is left on the border of Singapore and Malaysia. Two investigators, one from each country, must work together to catch a killer bent on highlighting social problems that they think are plaguing people on both sides of the border.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Password US - Series 2
programme.desc: Iconic word-guessing gameshow Password returns with The Tonight Show host Jimmy Fallon as one the celebrity players accompanied by Nope actress Keke Palmer as host. Contestants face off in the ultimate game of words, competing to win up to 25,000 by guessing a secret password from only single-word clues.

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Arts 21
programme.desc: ARTS 21 is an arts magazine show focusing on the latest news and events on the culture scene.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.title: Clean it, Fix it – Series 4
programme.desc: Master builder and household favourite Tommy Walsh, expert pro cleaner Maxine Dwyer and creative carpenter Asher Edwards help people across the UK to renovate and improve their homes. The team has two days to transform a living space in desperate need of some love. Series 4 sees enterprising co-presenter Mark Wright and a new expert de-clutterer join in the challenge of making tired homes relievable – without breaking the bank.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S6
programme.desc: Ollie and Ollicopter look set to win the grand prize at the Ollipolis Air Show, until The Imp decides to cheat and use a giant magnet to bring down Ollicopter. It's up to Cherry and Sloppy to find out how magnets work and stop The Imp to save Ollie and Ollicopter. The Imp attempts to steal the bird's voices to create a lullaby for himself. Ollie, Sloppy and Cherry team up with a courageous kookaburra to beat him at his own game.

programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Chinese) Pocoyo is a curious, fun-loving, friendly toddler who's always into something new whether he's on a quest with his friends in outer space or just cleaning up his blocks, every day is an adventure.

programme.title: Go Jetters: Sr3
programme.desc: Go Jetters go bigger as our plucky international heroes Xuli, Kyan, Lars and Foz, together with their disco-grooving mentor Ubercorn, discover lots more about our world. And we learn much more about each of the Go Jetters too. Travelling from the top of the planet to the very bottom, their action-packed adventures take them to truly incredible places. And there's a good chance Grandmaster Glitch has got there first to cause his usual chaos!

programme.title: 123 Number Squad S1
programme.desc: The Number Squad uses their math skills to figure out how to keep the Farm Haywire's chickens from flying off the roof of his barn while he makes some adjustment to the new feed machine. The Number Squad is lost as Tim has trouble using the 5 set of directions to giving proper instructions to help them find Maurice's lost sea lion puppy! Fortunately, Number 5 may be able to help them.

programme.title: Moka's Fabulous Adventures
programme.desc: Moka, the King of the Savannah's son, a naive and reckless little crocodile, leaves home one day to go explore his vast kingdom. Cherry, a brave rhinoceros from the Royal Guard is sent along to insure his protection. But much to her despair, Moka's insatiable curiosity and impulsive behavior are constantly getting them into trouble!

programme.title: Emerald
programme.desc: Emerald is learning how to be a mermaid princess, but she doesn't feel like one at all. She's not very good at waving to crowds and royal headdresses just aren't her thing - her hair is too spiky and wild. In a universe that celebrates the natural world and the joy of creativity, Emerald will come to understand she can learn to do things her own way!

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu!
programme.desc: Karthick Arthur is on a mission—first, he ditches Kunjesh (again), then charms Thayamma into letting him go solo. Destination? Serbia! From the heart of Jurong to the bohemian streets of Skadarlija, what's waiting for him in this hidden European gem? If you're curious about what Serbia has in store for your next vacation—or just want to see what kind of trouble Karthick gets into—hit that play button now!

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu!
programme.desc: Forget tourist traps—Karthick wants the full local experience! In this episode, he trades grand monuments for the everyday charm of Serbian suburbs. programme.title: Dost

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu!
programme.desc: With a cool 16C breeze in the air, Karthick dives deeper into Serbia's soul. From echoes of the Kosovo War to the grand elegance of Hotel Moskva, this journey is full of contrasts. But nostalgia hits hard when he starts craving home-cooked food—so what does he do? He fires up the stove and cooks a spicy sardine sambal, right in the heart of Serbia! Can he recreate Grandma's magic?

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu!
programme.desc: Next stop: Sofia, Bulgaria! Karthick kicks off his day with a local breakfast that tastes like a crispy prata wrapped around an apple pie—yes, you read that right! But that's just the beginning. He steps into history at the only Ottoman-built mosque in the city, strolls through the charming streets of Bulgaria, and wraps up the day with a feast fit for a king...
